instruction:
Compute the integral:
$$
\int \frac{ 1 }{ 2 \cdot \sin\left(\frac{ x }{ 2 }\right)^6 } \, dx
$$

Options:
A. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \frac{3}{2} \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
B. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \frac{5}{3} \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
C. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
D. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 + \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 + \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
E. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 + 2 \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
F. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - 2 \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
G. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 + \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
H. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \frac{4}{3} \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
I. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 - \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \frac{1}{2} \cdot \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
J. C - \frac{1}{5} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^5 + \frac{2}{3} \cdot \left(\cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right)^3 - \cot\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)
